◎简　　介  

　　Directed by Carlo Lizzani and with a superb soundtrack by Riz Ortolani, REQUIESCANT (Latin for "Rest in Peace") ranks among the finest Spaghetti Westerns. Lou Castel plays a young man who was raised to be a pacifist by a traveling preacher after Confederates massacred his family. But when his step-sister runs away, the pursuit reveals a natural talent as a sharp-shooter as well...
